/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/example.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/example.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/core/collision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/core/numberf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/core/tile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/scene/entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/scene/object.cpp.o -o example  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -lpthread /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl
